results.rendered_html: saudāyika mfn. (fr. su-dāya) that which is given to a woman at her marriage by her father or mother or any relative and therefore becomes her property,  Dāyabh. ;  Hcat.

results.rendered_html:
saudāyika a. (kī f.) Whatever is given to a woman at her marriage by her parents, or a relative in general, which becomes her own property.
— kaṃ A nuptial present so made.
